assumptions: Assume the recognised intragroup dividend receivable is a foreign-currency-denominated monetary item.
Assume the question concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Intragroup monetary item hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context expressly identifies foreign currency risk of an intragroup monetary item as a hedged item category in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Forecast intragroup transaction hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context expressly identifies foreign currency risk of a forecast intragroup transaction as a hedged item category in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context separately sets out the hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk on a net investment in a foreign operation, including IFRIC 16 guidance.
